docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ADLON BASILO - ERBACH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUGUSTO DA SILVA BASILO IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BASILO-ERBACH, ADLON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DA SILVA BASILO, AUGUSTO DEFENDANT PREVAILS. DEFENDANT WAS MORE CREDIBLE THAN THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY BASILO-ERBACH, ADLON AS TO DEFENDANT DA SILVA BASILO, AUGUSTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER BASILO-ERBACH, ADLON
